headline: Parabilis Raises Nearly $745 Million As IPO Demand Surges
summary: Cancer drug developer priced above range after demand reportedly reached about 10 times available shares.

raw.headline: Parabilis Raises Nearly $745 Million As IPO Demand Surges
raw.summary: Cancer drug developer priced above range after demand reportedly reached about 10 times available shares.

headline: Parabilis Medicines raises record $670 million in biotech IPO
summary: The Cambridge, Massachusetts-based biotech priced 33.5 million shares at $20 each, topping the $625 million raised by Kailera Therapeutics in April

raw.headline: Parabilis Medicines raises record $670 million in biotech IPO
raw.summary: The Cambridge, Massachusetts-based biotech priced 33.5 million shares at $20 each, topping the $625 million raised by Kailera Therapeutics in April

headline: Parabilis sets a record with a $670M biotech IPO
summary: The largest-ever new stock sale for a venture-backed biotech company extends a streak of large IPOs in 2026 that’s now resulted in 12 drug startups securing more than $4.1 billion combined.

raw.headline: Parabilis sets a record with a $670M biotech IPO
raw.summary: The largest-ever new stock sale for a venture-backed biotech company extends a streak of large IPOs in 2026 that’s now resulted in 12 drug startups securing more than $4.1 billion combined.
